dataset: Polatlı OSM building footprints and 3D tags
bbox_description: Same Polatlı urban study area and immediate outskirts as the street graph
tile_grid: 12 direct OSM API XML map tiles; 0.03 latitude by 0.035 longitude each
height_policy: Use height tag when present; otherwise estimate building:levels at 3 metres per level; otherwise retain footprint with height 0 and mark footprint_only
